Adjust the opacity if needed to better s: Fetuunai le opacity pe a manaʻomia ina ia sili atu ona iloa atu vaega o loʻo i lalo.

Are you sure you want to start over and: Ua e mautinoa e te mana'o e toe amata ma toe tusi lau ata?
Calculations are queued and should start: Ua fa'alaina fuafuaga ma e tatau ona amata mo sina taimi.
Calculations will start once overlay lay: O le a amata fuafuaga pe a uma ona fa'agasoloina vaega fa'apipi'i.
Cell Layer Opacity: Le Mafiafi o le Vaega o le Sela
created this sketch on: faia lenei ata tusi i luga
Delete Geometry: Tape ese laina o tusitusiga ata
Downsampled cells are displayed, roughly: O lo'o fa'aalia sela ua fa'aitiitia le fa'ata'ita'iga, e tutusa ma se fa'afanua sikuea <2> </2>. Fa'alautele e va'ai ai i sela ua atoatoa le iugafono.
Finish using the measurement tool before: Fa'auma le fa'aogaina o le mea faigaluega fua a'o le'i fa'aauau le tusi.
Full resolution cells are being shown, r: O lo'o fa'aalia sela e atoatoa le iugafono, e tutusa ma se grid sikuea <2> </2>.
Name: Igoa
Processing your sketch. This should only: Fa'atonu lau ata tusi. E tatau ona na'o sina taimi.
Results are calculated when a sketch is: E fuafuaina i'uga pe a faia pe fa'afouina se ata. E mafai ona vaevaeina Polygons ina ia fa'ailoa ai le fa'alava o le antimeridian pe fa'atasi ma isi ata i totonu o se fa'aputuga.
SeaSketch creates optimized layers for f: E faia e le SeaSketch ni vaega ua fa'aleleia atili mo le fa'agasologa vave. E na'o le fa'atasi lava ona mana'omia ona faia nei vaega, pe a fa'afouina se vaega puna.
Select cells where this property is: Filifili sela o lo'o iai lenei meatotino
Select one or more options to limit cell: Filifili se tasi pe sili atu filifiliga e fa'atapula'a ai sela i na o lo'o tutusa tau. Afai e leai se filifiliga e faia, o le a le fa'aogaina lenei faamama.
SignInToSketch: Fa'amolemole <2>saini</2> po'o le <6>tapena se account</6> e amata ai ona tusitusi se ata.
There was a problem calculating metrics: Sa i ai se faʻafitauli i le fuafuaina o fuainumera mo lenei kata.
These metrics are calculated in order to: O nei fua fa'atatau e fuafuaina ina ia maua ai fuainumera aoga e pei o le pasene o le ufiufi. E pei o vaega ua fa'aleleia atili, e na'o le toe fuafuaina pe a fa'afouina se vaega puna.

O lenei vaega o lo'o i ai tau fa'aofi.
Kiliki e fa'alautele.
Use the sliders above to filter between: Faaaoga ia faase'e o lo'o i luga e fa'amama ai le va o se vaega o tau i le histogram, pe seti ni tau sa'o i mea o lo'o i lalo.
What would you like to name your folder?: O le a le igoa o lau faila?

You must fix problems with your geometry: E tatau ona e fa'aleleia muamua fa'afitauli i lau geometry
